name: Welsh Rabbit
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups Shredded cheddar or American cheese (6 oz)
4 Slices Bread, toasted OR Poached eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan combine shredded cheese, milk, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the cheese melts.
3. Slowly stir about half of the hot cheese mixture into 1 beaten egg; return all to the remaining mixture in the pan.
4. Cook and stir over low heat until the mixture thickens and just bubbles.
5. Serve at once over toast or poached eggs.
6. Beer Rabbit: Prepare Welsh Rabbit as above, except substitute beer for the milk. Top each serving with 2 slices of crisp‑cooked bacon, halved crosswise.
Makes 4 servings.
